inline_comments.message: I think this is a duplicate Dockerfile from integration project.   Would it be possible to get it from that repo if this was the case?

Apologies, I have removed this file from the review.

The existing docker file for onap-java11 does not work on aarm64 architecture. The reason is that they are using a base image for that one that integrates Alpine and Java 11, but that base image does not exist for aarm64. We will have to build a base image directly from Alpine and add java11 in integration for that, which is what this Dockerfile does.

I will raise a review on the integration/docker/java11 repo for that one, just adding this Dockerfile so it is available for people that want to generate locally on ARM. The default remains Alpine.

BTW, the onap-python image generates just fine on aarm64.

So, to get the Policy Framework working on ARM locally, we just need this review and a review to bring in the ARM dockerfile in integration. After that, the ARM build works just fine.
